headline: Corteva and Arevo Partner on Soy Crop Nutrition
summary: The partnership will help farmers in Europe improve nutrient use efficiencyUMEÅ, July 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Corteva, a global pure-play agriculture company, and Arevo, a Swedish science-led crop nutrition company, have announced a partnership on Arginex Soy, Arevo’s seed applied crop nutrition system. Corteva and Arevo Partner on Soy Crop Nutrition Arginex Soy is an innovative arginine1-based seed treatment designed to strengthen root systems, increase nodulation and improve soybean perfo
